name: 12.1-reaper
description: Step 12.1 floor-fix bench — Reaper (post-edit) vs Reaper-prefloor (pre-edit) on hollow-disruption. 40 games cross-pair (no mirror, no self). Post-edit Reaper passes if it wins >=55% of decisive games. Same tournament harness + caps as 12.0 baseline: 6000 inputs, 150000 events, logLevel=llm.
